title: Recursive Fibonacci Generator
scenario: Write a function in Python that generates the Fibonacci sequence up to the nth number using recursion. The function should be named 'fibonacci_recursion' and should have two parameters: 'n' for the sequence length and 'memo' for memoization. The output should be a list of Fibonacci numbers.
constraints: Must be under 50 lines of code
Must use memoization to improve performance

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code is syntactically correct and uses Python syntax.
Check if the code meets the constraints specified in the scenario.
Check if the code uses memoization to improve performance.
Check if the code is readable and follows best practices.
